title: DEPTH_LIMIT_REACHED payload
description: Emitted BEFORE DepthLimitExceededError is raised. Marks a provenance path as requiring human intervention. Governs path-scoped session freeze derivation (Invariant 2 structural enforcement, Invariant 4 reconstructability).

computed_depth.description: The depth the Hypothesis WOULD HAVE HAD if registered. Strictly greater than governing_ceiling.

frozen_provenance_ancestors.description: Transitive closure of upstream HYP IDs whose descendants are now frozen under path-scoped freeze. Derived purely from ledger at emission time.

rejection_reason.description: Closed enum. Sprint-3 introduces one reason. Additional reasons require an explicit schema change plus changelog entry.
